markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If either team scores a run in the first inning of the Baltimore vs Seattle professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 18, 2026 at 4:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.title: Baltimore vs Seattle First Inning Run?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Baltimore and Seattle go to extra innings in the Baltimore vs Seattle professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 18, 2026 at 4:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.title: Will there be extra innings in the Baltimore vs Seattle game originally scheduled for Jun 18, 2026 at 4:10 PM EDT?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Seattle wins the Baltimore vs Seattle professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 18, 2026 at 4:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Baltimore vs Seattle professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 18, 2026 at 4:10 PM EDT. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two days). If the game is cancelled or rescheduled to over two days away, the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules.
markets.title: Baltimore vs Seattle Winner?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Baltimore wins the Baltimore vs Seattle professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 18, 2026 at 4:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Baltimore vs Seattle professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 18, 2026 at 4:10 PM EDT. markets.title: Baltimore vs Seattle Winner?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If J.T. Realmuto records 3+ hits in the Miami vs Philadelphia professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 15, 2026 at 6:40 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If J.T. Realmuto is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If J.T. Realmuto starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If J.T. Realmuto is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If J.T. Realmuto is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: J.T. Realmuto: 3+ hits?
